api_error_suppression.description: Suppress retry storms and error amplification on API layer
api_error_suppression.effect_description: Clears error backlog, resets failed request counters
api_error_suppression.name: API Error Suppression
api_error_suppression.trigger_condition: API error rate > 5% AND rate_limit is exhausted

cache_flush.description: Purge stale cache entries to reduce cache latency and errors
cache_flush.effect_description: Reduces Cache node latency by ~40%, clears stale data
cache_flush.name: Cache Flush
cache_flush.trigger_condition: Cache latency > 60ms OR Cache error rate > 3%

circuit_breaker.description: Open circuit breaker to isolate failing backend services
circuit_breaker.effect_description: Isolates failing services, prevents error propagation across nodes
circuit_breaker.name: Circuit Breaker
circuit_breaker.trigger_condition: Backend error rate > 8% OR Backend latency > 150ms

connection_pool_reset.description: Reset and resize database connection pool
connection_pool_reset.effect_description: Frees stale DB connections, reduces latency by ~35%
connection_pool_reset.name: Connection Pool Reset

queue_drain.description: Drain backlogged queue messages and reset consumers
queue_drain.effect_description: Clears message backlog, restores processing throughput
queue_drain.name: Queue Drain

rate_limit.description: Activate adaptive rate limiting to reduce API overload
rate_limit.effect_description: Reduces API saturation by ~30%, prevents cascading failures
rate_limit.name: Rate Limiter
rate_limit.trigger_condition: API saturation > 60% OR API error rate > 7%

scale_in_backend.description: Drop a Backend replica when over-provisioned
scale_in_backend.effect_description: Returns compute capacity; M/M_cap rises toward Ψ_c target 0.55
scale_in_backend.name: Scale In Backend
scale_in_backend.trigger_condition: Backend boosted AND saturation < 25% AND latency < 50ms — eutectic-pulled

scale_in_cache_node.description: Decommission a Cache node when over-provisioned
scale_in_cache_node.effect_description: Returns cache capacity; M/M_cap rises toward Ψ_c target 0.55
scale_in_cache_node.name: Scale In Cache Node

scale_in_db_read_replica.description: Drop a DB read replica when over-provisioned
scale_in_db_read_replica.effect_description: Returns DB capacity; M/M_cap rises toward Ψ_c target 0.55
scale_in_db_read_replica.name: Scale In DB Read Replica
scale_in_db_read_replica.trigger_condition: DB boosted AND saturation < 25% AND latency < 50ms — eutectic-pulled

scale_in_frontend.description: Drop a Frontend replica when over-provisioned (M/M_cap << 0.55)
scale_in_frontend.effect_description: Returns capacity to the pool; M/M_cap and L/L₀ rise toward Ψ_c targets (0.55, 1.5)
scale_in_frontend.name: Scale In Frontend
scale_in_frontend.trigger_condition: Frontend boosted AND saturation < 25% AND latency < 50ms — eutectic-pulled

scale_out_backend.description: Add a Backend worker replica to spread compute + IO load
scale_out_backend.effect_description: Adds compute capacity; reduces Backend latency ~40% and saturation ~55%
scale_out_backend.name: Scale Out Backend

scale_out_cache_node.description: Add a Cache node and rebalance keyspace (sharding)
scale_out_cache_node.effect_description: Adds cache capacity; reduces Cache latency ~50% and saturation ~65%
scale_out_cache_node.name: Scale Out Cache Node

scale_out_db_read_replica.description: Provision an additional DB read replica and route reads through it
scale_out_db_read_replica.effect_description: Splits read load across replicas; reduces DB latency ~40% and saturation ~55%
scale_out_db_read_replica.name: Scale Out DB Read Replica

scale_out_frontend.description: Add a Frontend replica to absorb client-facing load
scale_out_frontend.effect_description: Adds compute capacity; reduces Frontend latency ~45% and saturation ~60%
scale_out_frontend.name: Scale Out Frontend

recommendations.description: Add a Frontend replica to absorb client-facing load
recommendations.effect: Adds compute capacity; reduces Frontend latency ~45% and saturation ~60%

recommendations.description: Add a Backend worker replica to spread compute + IO load
recommendations.effect: Adds compute capacity; reduces Backend latency ~40% and saturation ~55%

recommendations.description: Activate adaptive rate limiting to reduce API overload
recommendations.effect: Reduces API saturation by ~30%, prevents cascading failures

recommendations.description: Decommission a Cache node when over-provisioned
recommendations.effect: Returns cache capacity; M/M_cap rises toward Ψ_c target 0.55
